task_objective: Fix commit errors caused by the pre-commit hook staging unrelated tracked changes.
tests_added: tests/test_protocol.py now rejects broad git add -u pre-commit behavior and requires restaging only captured staged paths.
design_decisions: Capture staged added/copied/modified/renamed paths before Ruff runs.
After formatting, run git add only on those captured paths.
Patch both the tracked hook source and the live checkout hook so the fix applies immediately.
results: ./run.sh uv run ty check py_modules/sdh_ludusavi/ passed
./run.sh uv run pytest passed with 185 tests
